questions.a: iERP is a high-fidelity institutional management ecosystem designed for modern universities and colleges.
A standard implementation typically ranges from 4 to 12 weeks depending on campus size.
Yes, our Enterprise plan includes options for dedicated on-premise or private cloud deployment.
No. Our pricing is transparent. Implementation and training fees are clearly outlined in the proposal.
We use AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 for all data in transit, with 24/7 security monitoring.
Absolutely. Our AI heuristics engine handles conflict-free scheduling across unlimited campuses.
Yes, every plan includes a dedicated training period for both administrative and academic staff.
iERP is a cloud-native platform accessible via any modern web browser. No local hardware is required.

questions.q: Can we upgrade our plan later?
questions.a: Yes, you can upgrade from Standard to Professional or Enterprise at any point during your cycle.

questions.q: Is iERP compliant with local regulations?
questions.a: We maintain compliance with major global standards including GDPR, SOC2, and local educational data laws.

questions.q: How does the AI timetable engine work?
questions.a: It uses advanced genetic algorithms to optimize teacher, student, and room availability while minimizing gaps.

questions.q: Can we import existing student data?
questions.a: Yes, we provide automated migration tools and expert assistance to import your legacy data.
Our Professional and Enterprise plans offer full RESTful API access for third-party integrations.
We accept institutional wire transfers, corporate credit cards, and major digital payment gateways.
Yes, MFA is mandatory for all administrative accounts to ensure maximum system integrity.

questions.q: Can students view their grades online?
questions.a: Yes, the integrated Student Portal provides real-time access to grades, attendance, and schedules.

questions.q: Do you offer a free trial?
questions.a: We offer detailed product demonstrations and a sandbox environment for evaluation.
We guarantee 99.9% uptime with a financially backed Service Level Agreement (SLA).
We offer specialized pricing for non-profit educational institutions and NGOs.

questions.q: Where are your data centers located?
questions.a: We use Tier-4 data centers across AWS and Azure regions in India, Europe, and Singapore.
Yes, our exam module includes secure online testing, proctoring tools, and automated grading.
Support is available via our 24/7 helpdesk, email, and dedicated institutional account managers.

questions.q: Can we use our own domain?
questions.a: Yes, you can white-label the platform using your own subdomains (e.g., portal.university.edu).

questions.q: Is there a long-term contract requirement?
questions.a: Annual plans offer significant savings, but we also provide flexible monthly billing cycles.

questions.q: Can we export our data at any time?
questions.a: Yes, you own your data. You can perform full encrypted exports of your institutional records at any time.

questions.q: Does the system handle alumni records?
questions.a: Yes, we have a dedicated Alumni Module for tracking post-graduation success and engagement.
Currently, iERP supports English, Hindi, and Arabic, with more languages in our roadmap.

questions.q: How often is the software updated?
questions.a: We push minor updates weekly and major feature releases every quarter, with zero downtime.

questions.q: Is there a limit on student accounts?
questions.a: Standard plans have tiered limits, while Enterprise plans offer unlimited student and staff seating.
Yes, full audit logs are maintained for every administrative action taken within the system.
Yes, our Smart Library module includes barcode tracking, fine management, and digital lending.
Yes, our Fleet-Track module provides GPS tracking and route optimization for campus buses.
Yes, both Android and iOS apps for students and staff are included in all plans.
You can cancel your subscription with a 30-day notice period. Data export assistance is provided.

questions.q: Who has access to our database?
questions.a: Only authorized institutional administrators. iERP staff only access databases upon explicit request for support.

questions.q: Can we generate custom report cards?
questions.a: Yes, our report engine allows for bespoke design of transcripts, certificates, and grade sheets.

questions.q: How do we request a feature?
questions.a: We have a dedicated client portal where you can submit and vote on new feature requests.
Yes, we support LDAP, Active Directory, and Google Workspace for single sign-on (SSO).

questions.q: Is tax included in the price?
questions.a: Prices are exclusive of local taxes (e.g., GST/VAT) which are applied based on your jurisdiction.

questions.q: Do you perform regular penetration testing?
questions.a: Yes, we conduct quarterly third-party security audits and daily automated vulnerability scans.
